chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-600 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of M.A. No.3043/2023. For hearing of main case. 20-09-2023 Mr. Sohail Ahmed advocate along with the petitioner. Mr. Sunder Das and Mr. Autif Ali Hakro advocates for respondents. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General Sindh. ***** The decree of which the petitioner is aggrieved does not disclose the survey number that they claim. If it is so, they have no cause to file application under Section 12 CPC or to agitate their grievances before this court in the shape of this writ petition. They have a separate survey numbers which they can agitate before the Executing Court if the writ is wrongly been issued for their piece of land, which is independent of the survey number disclosed in the decree. Learned counsel for petitioner further pointed out that they have already filed an application before the Executing Court, and perhaps, as disclosed by the counsel, additional evidence was ordered to be recorded. The petition merits no consideration and is accordingly dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan Ali
